> 抓取来源：https://leria-info.univ-angers.fr/%7Ejinkao.hao/wvcp.html

This
page contains information related to the paper:

Wen Sun,
Jin-Kao Hao, Xiangjing Lai and Qinghua Wu. Adaptive feasible and
infeasible tabu search for weighted vertex coloring. Information Sciences 466: 203-219, 2018.

The binary code of the algorithm and a readme file are available [here](https://leria-info.univ-angers.fr/%7Ejinkao.hao/WVCP/WVCPCode.zip)

The fourth set of 50 DIMACS/COLOR instances are available [here](https://leria-info.univ-angers.fr/%7Ejinkao.hao/WVCP/WVCP_instances_DIMACS.zip)
